issue_summary: Remove deprecated charset support from Greek and Russian analyzers
javadoc_before:
/** * A RussianLetterTokenizer is a {@link Tokenizer} that extends {@link LetterTokenizer} * by additionally looking up letters in a given "russian charset". *

* The problem with * {@link LetterTokenizer} is that it uses {@link Character#isLetter(char)} method, * which doesn't know how to detect letters in encodings like CP1252 and KOI8 * (well-known problems with 0xD7 and 0xF7 chars) *

* * @version $Id$ */
